name: Spinach Dip in a Bread Bowl
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the first six ingredients.
2. Chill for at least 1 hour.
3. Cut a 1-1/2 inch slice off the top of the loaf; set aside.
4. Hollow out the bottom part, leaving a thick shell.
5. Cut or tear the slice from the top of the loaf and bread pieces from inside into bite-size pieces.
6. Fill the shell with dip; place on a large platter.
7. Arrange the bread pieces and vegetables around it.
8. Serve immediately.
Yield: 10 to 15 servings.
